positioning: Independent Cloudways pricing, billing, and WordPress hosting reference. GitHub repository supports source-led documentation and routes English readers to CloudwaysGuide while routing Chinese readers to WPCloudGuide where useful.

officialSources.name: Cloudways Pricing
officialSources.notes: Use for live plan, provider, region, and promotion checks before purchase.

officialSources.name: Guide to Billing at Cloudways
officialSources.notes: Use for pay-as-you-go, monthly invoice, payment method, and authorization hold explanations.

officialSources.name: How do I resolve payment issues on Cloudways?
officialSources.notes: Use for card refusal, 3D Secure, billing permission, and overdue invoice troubleshooting.

officialSources.name: Cloudways Autonomous
officialSources.notes: Use for autoscaling, plan-based pricing, billing, and suitability notes.

publicSafetyRules: Do not include API keys, account tokens, affiliate dashboard screenshots, personal identifiers, payment details, or server credentials.
Do not claim official Cloudways status.
Do not present old prices as guaranteed current prices.
Do not add raw affiliate links to the README first screen.
